summary: Added a canonical agentic RL layer-map doc positioning Datalox as the tool-I/O VCR / record-based mocking layer, with explicit non-ownership of sandbox/runtime, environment construction, behavioral mock construction, reward functions, judge agents, and RL algorithms. Updated first-read docs and canonical project docs to point future agents at this boundary, and added regression coverage to keep the new doc part of active replay surfaces.

agentTurn.user_prompt: record this into doc, including future plan(with technical details), update current docs if necessary

file_changes.diff_summary: New canonical layer-map doc with Datalox as Layer 1.5 tool-I/O record/replay, record-based vs behavioral mocking vocabulary, buyer discovery question, product boundary, and phased technical plan.
References the layer-map doc as product boundary inside the broader sandbox/env/reward stack and adds explicit non-goals for stateful environment/mock construction and reward/judge engines.
Adds top-level wording that Datalox owns tool-I/O record/replay, is complementary to sandbox/runtime/env/reward systems, and does not invent unseen stateful behavior.
Adds layer-boundary guidance and includes agentic-rl-layer-map.md in repo-local replay data surfaces.
Adds layer-map read guidance for sandbox, environment, mock, reward, and agentic RL positioning tasks.
Adds the same layer boundary to Claude instructions.
Adds the same layer boundary to Gemini instructions.
Adds the layer-map doc to first-read guidance.
Adds layer boundary bullets for tool-I/O record/replay ownership and non-ownership of runtime/env/mock/reward/judge layers.
Links the canonical layer boundary doc and adds the non-ownership summary.
Adds tests ensuring the layer-map doc is read with canonical replay docs and remains part of active replay surfaces.

verification.command: npm test && npm run check && git diff --check
verification.evidence: Full suite passed: 16 test files, 100 tests. TypeScript no-emit check passed. git diff --check passed.
